sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Player is at cols 18-23. Let me try moving LEFT one more time
result = action(['LEFT'])
print(f"After LEFT: gameplay_changed={result.get('gameplay_changed', False)}, no_impact={result.get('no_impact', False)}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
yellow_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'Y']
print(f"Yellow boundary: {yellow_nodes[0]['boundary'] if yellow_nodes else 'none'}")

if last_transition:
    before_yellow = [n for n in last_transition.before_frame.segmentation['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'Y']
    if before_yellow and yellow_nodes:
        if before_yellow[0]['boundary'] != yellow_nodes[0]['boundary']:
            print("Player MOVED LEFT")
        else:
            print("Player did NOT move (blocked)")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

# Player is at cols 18-23. Let me try moving LEFT one more time
result = action(['LEFT'])
print(f"After LEFT: gameplay_changed={result.get('gameplay_changed', False)}, no_impact={result.get('no_impact', False)}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
yellow_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'Y']
print(f"Yellow boundary: {yellow_nodes[0]['boundary'] if yellow_nodes else 'none'}")

if last_transition:
    before_yellow = [n for n in last_transition.before_frame.segmentation['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'Y']
    if before_yellow and yellow_nodes:
        if before_yellow[0]['boundary'] != yellow_nodes[0]['boundary']:
            print("Player MOVED LEFT")
        else:
            print("Player did NOT move (blocked)")
